category_sources: Official GCC site identifies GCC as the GNU Compiler Collection.
source_facts.description says GNU compiler collection m68k-elf.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as the GNU compiler collection for m68k-elf.
docs_sources: Official GCC documentation index is hosted at gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/.
repo_sources: Official GCC Git access page lists https://gcc.gnu.org/git/gcc.git as the public source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names GNU compiler collection and m68k-elf.
source_facts.executables lists target-prefixed gcc, g++, cpp, gcov, and lto tools.
